title: After the Love Has Gone
why_this_song: After the Love Has Gone by Earth, Wind & Fire (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "right" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "right" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "used" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Deep inside, we knew our love was true

exercises.prompt_en: "After the Love Has Gone" was released in 1979. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "After the Love Has Gone" foi lançada em 1979. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "After the Love Has Gone" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "After the Love Has Gone" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Earth, Wind & Fire one question about "After the Love Has Gone", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Earth, Wind & Fire sobre "After the Love Has Gone", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "After the Love Has Gone" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "After the Love Has Gone" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
